title: TransDigm Aerospace Component Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for a TransDigm Group aerospace component data record.

fields.name: productCategory
fields.description: High-level product category (Actuation Systems, Ignition Systems, etc.).

fields.name: aircraftPlatforms
fields.description: Aircraft platforms this component is qualified for.

fields.name: market
fields.description: Market segment: Commercial, Military, or Both.

fields.name: isSoleSource
fields.description: Whether TransDigm is the sole qualified manufacturer.

fields.name: isProprietary
fields.description: Whether TransDigm holds the proprietary design.

fields.name: certifications
fields.description: Applicable FAA, EASA, and other certifications.
